name: Kal Penn Approves This Message
overview: A smart, irreverent unscripted comedy series that explores issues relevant to Millennial and GenZ voters. Each episode consists of comedic field pieces and a sit-down interview with topics ranging from voting basics to voter empowerment, the economy to climate change.

trailers.title: Kal Penn Approves This Message | Tackling The Big Questions | Freeform
